message:
style: standardize import ordering and collapse verbose conditionals

Reorder imports across src/lib.rs and all test files to follow
alphabetical/logical grouping conventions:
- Sort core::simd imports, consolidate rand imports in lib.rs
- Alphabetize test file imports consistently

Expand two single-line conditional expressions in lib.rs to multi-line
if/else blocks for improved readability (eigenvalue decomposition
sign correction and covariance matrix symmetry enforcement).

Pure style change — no functional modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
